mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 1
mnemonics.content: CRD stands for Completely Randomized Design

mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 2
mnemonics.content: No grouping, every treatment is equally likely

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: Each experimental unit is randomly assigned to a treatment

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: All treatments are compared to a control (or baseline)

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: No replication, but there can be multiple trials
